title: 3102026Wetreport2026Kmarll5
summary:
Main
• VLCC Rates Explode Higher as the Worst-Case Scenario becomes Reality - The global oil market is currently experiencing an unprecedented disruption in supply flows. As Iran maintains strategic control over the Straits of Hormuz, exports from the Arabian Gulf have reached a virtual standstill. Historically, freight benchmarks have adapted to geopolitical and structural shifts.
